body: Verification focused suite independently passed (same six classes), and git diff --check passed. BLOCK remains: catching enqueueIfMediaExists from an @Transactional(REQUIRED) service inside AlertEventService transactional methods does not isolate repository/JPA failures; the shared transaction can be marked rollback-only. Mock service throws do not exercise this. Requirement explicitly says enqueue failures remain side-channel failures. Please address/prove a true after-commit or isolated boundary before final completion. Your prior mailbox body arrived as undefined (API requires body, not message).
